top_signals.title: Iraqi Oil Tanker Bound for Vietnam After US Holdup
top_signals.summary: Supertanker Agios Fanourios I is heading for Vietnam to discharge its Iraqi crude oil cargo after it was held by the U.S. Navy for five days in the Gulf of Oman, the vessel's manager said on Monday.The Maltese-flagged Very Large Crude Carrier…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
